calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Turnover Order In Aid Of Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 699.040
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., a national banking association MOTION FOR TURNOVER ORDER IN AID OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 699.040.

APPEARANCES: James Coy Driscoll, Esq. of Law Offices of James Coy Driscoll 673-6000 appearing specially for pltf's counsel of Hemar, Rousso & Heald, LLP 818/501-3800 moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Beldon Yee, #2647.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., a national banking association.
Jacki Whyte, Retail Client Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lei Ming Liu, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on September 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., a national banking association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lei Ming Liu, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $62,985.74.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,257.53.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $529.00, for a total monetary judgment in the amount of $70,597.27.

The Court further Orders that owner of, and entitled to possession of the 2008 Mercedes Benz, VIN: 4JGBF71E38A372895.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Continued To Jan-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing;
